strengths: ~17 years of continuous software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, satisfying the 15-year minimum.
Entrepreneurial track record — founded GISCollective and held staff/senior roles at startups (WatchUp, RIDE Capital), demonstrating initiative and product ownership.
Current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) frameworks at re:cinq signals genuine engagement with the agentic AI space.
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field; educational background is a BS in Computer Science plus a fine arts degree, with no formal ML or AI training evident.

AI experience is shallow and very recent (April 2025–present); the role requires recognized expertise with demonstrated AI products or platforms shipped at scale, which the resume does not substantiate.

Career trajectory and titles (Senior/Staff Developer) reflect an individual execution focus rather than the Director-level strategic advising, customer-facing thought leadership, and organizational influence the role demands.
response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine technical versatility and a long career, but the profile is that of a senior hands-on engineer rather than a Director-level AI strategist. The role's core requirements — recognized AI expertise, a demonstrated record of building AI-powered products or platforms at scale, and the ability to advise strategic customers and inspire broad internal/external audiences — are not evidenced in the resume. His AI exposure is nascent (MCP tooling, barely two months old at the time of this review) and his seniority markers do not reach the organizational influence level the position requires.
